column1: #   growth_days           - Total days from planting to harvest (real-world basis
#   water_liters_per_day  - Water requirement in liters per plant per day
#   temp_min_c            - Minimum growing temperature in Celsius
#   temp_max_c            - Maximum growing temperature in Celsius
#   yield_min             - Minimum harvest yield per plant (units)
#   yield_max             - Maximum harvest yield per plant (units)
#   seed_value            - Base trade value of seeds (credits)
#   harvest_value         - Base trade value of harvested crop (credits)
#   skill_required        - Minimum farming skill level needed
#   seed_source           - Where seeds can be obtained (colon-separated)
#   companion_plants      - Plants that grow well nearby (colon-separated ids)
#   adverse_plants        - Plants that should not be grown nearby (colon-separated ids)
